title: Kaadhal Oru Sathurangam Lyrics Azhagu Kutti Chellam Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Kaadhal Oru Sathurangam Song Lyrics
Singer: Chinmayi, Abhay Jodhpurkar
Lyrics: Na Muthukumar

kadhal
adhu maayamthaana
sollu nenjae nenjae
uyire en uyire
indha kadhal
poottil vidhigal illai.

Vizhi
thoondilgal podum
oh o oh oo
mozhi
mounathil moolgum
oh ho oooh..

idhu enna idhu enna
pudhuvidha
mayakkam
iravilum pagalilum
anbae
idhu ennai thurathidum

kadhal vandha
pinbu naanum
mella maari ponen
manasukkul
mazhai varudhae
oh ooo ho..

Pani paarvaigal
moodum
oh ooo ho..
ini veyil
vandhaal odum.
oh ooo ho..

un nizhal
unnai vittu
verengo pogum.
kangalil anudhinam
ayyo..ini
kanavugal kudivarum.

un gunam seyaellaam
mella maari pogum
unmayil poigal
solvaaye.

viral thodum
sugam adhu vidaadhey.
vilundhidum manam
adhu ezhaadhey.
idhu oru magarandha
vizhaavey.
hey hey..
....

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kaadhal Oru Sathurangam?

The song explores the complexities and strategic nature of love, likening it to a game of chess.

Who are the singers of this song?

Abhay Jodhpurkar and Chinmayi lend their voices to this beautiful duet.

Who wrote the lyrics for this song?

The lyrics were penned by the talented Na Muthukumar.

What is the context of the song in the movie Azhagu Kutti Chellam?

The song reflects on the emotional intricacies faced by the characters, highlighting love's unpredictable nature.

When was the song released?

The song was released in the year 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Azhagu Kutti Chellam, Kaadhal Oru Sathurangam is a poignant reflection on the strategic and unpredictable nature of love. Sung by Abhay Jodhpurkar and Chinmayi, the song's lyrics by Na Muthukumar delve into the emotional complexities faced by the characters. The melody evokes a sense of longing and introspection, capturing the essence of romantic entanglements. This duet beautifully conveys the bittersweet journey of love, making it a memorable piece in the film.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the intricate dance of love with Kaadhal Oru Sathurangam from the movie Azhagu Kutti Chellam. This soulful duet by Abhay Jodhpurkar and Chinmayi, penned by Na Muthukumar, captures the essence of love's complexities. Let the soothing melody transport you to a world of emotions and reflections.
stanzaMeanings: Love is like a chess game, waiting in a corner.
When love arrives, it demands your heart as a sacrifice.
The swinging swing is like the mind, love always captures the heart.
Love is an illusion, tell me heart, my life, in this love game there are no rules.
Love is like a chess game, waiting in a corner.
When love arrives, it demands your heart as a sacrifice.
What is this new kind of dizziness, day and night, my dear, it chases me away.
After love came, I slowly changed, rain is coming in my heart.
The raindrops touch me but don't burn, in cold and heat, they don't leave.
It doesn't give pleasure or pain to the heart.
The misty eyes close, oh, now when the sun comes, it runs away.
Your shadow leaves you and goes elsewhere, every day in your eyes, oh no, now dreams will come.
Your nature will slowly change, you will speak lies as truth.
The pleasure of touch doesn't leave, the fallen heart doesn't rise, this is a festival of nectar.
Love is like a chess game, waiting in a corner.
When love arrives, it demands your heart as a sacrifice.
